name: Western Copper and Gold Corporation
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is a Canada-based exploration and development company focused on advancing its 100%-owned Casino Project in Yukon, Canada. The Casino Project is one of the world's largest undeveloped copper-gold deposits, hosting significant resources of copper, gold, molybdenum, and silver. The company is committed to developing the project in an environmentally responsible and socially sustainable manner, working closely with local First Nations and communities to create long-term value.
